headline: Adtran Holdings, Inc. Appoints Anne DelSanto to Board of Directors
summary: HUNTSVILLE, Ala., June 25, 2026--Adtran Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: ADTN and FSE: QH9), a leading global provider of networking and communications solutions, today announced the appointment of Anne DelSanto as an independent member of its Board of Directors effective July 1, 2026. The appointment aligns with Adtran's expanding relevance beyond its service provider core, into cloud infrastructure, AI-driven networking, and enterprise software, markets where Ms. DelSanto has spent the majority of her

headline: FuelCell Energy Drops 10%, Bloom Energy Falls 7% in a Profit-Taking Reversal as Plug Power Edges Up
summary: Shares of FuelCell Energy (NASDAQ:FCEL) are down 10% in Thursday afternoon trading, leading a profit-taking reversal across some fuel cell names. The slide unwinds a chunk of yesterday’s 14% pop tied to FuelCell Energy’s strategic agreement with Fit Energy. Bloom Energy (NYSE:BE) stock is off 7%, last seen near $303 after closing Wednesday at $326.19. ... FuelCell Energy Drops 10%, Bloom Energy Falls 7% in a Profit-Taking Reversal as Plug Power Edges Up

headline: Micron Blows the Doors Off and Throws the AI Rally a Lifeline
summary: After a third session of selling pressure in chips, Micron's blowout Q4 guide reignited the AI trade after hours. Add Qualcomm's datacenter ambitions, Cerebras' rude welcome to public-company life, and oil sliding back to pre-war levels, Wednesday gave investors plenty to chew on.
